name: bob-lens
description: Local developer tool that visualizes AI-generated code changes from IBM Bob IDE

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=mcp-server && npm install --workspace=ui && npm install --workspace=sandbox
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:mcp" "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:sandbox"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=mcp-server && npm run build --workspace=ui && npm run build --workspace=sandbox
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules mcp-server/node_modules ui/node_modules sandbox/node_modules types/node_modules
